reason: MC05 had already rejected dispersion expansion because the mechanism could not identify continuation versus convergence before outcomes. H29 independently showed that dispersion shocks were not bad states and that standard-deviation versus MAD definitions were unstable, but should have been stopped by global family de-duplication before implementation.
process_correction: MC01-MC08 and their aliases were added to config/research_family_registry.json; future intake must search both that registry and the mechanism-pool register before any audit implementation.
